narrative.headline: SCRT2 maintains steady execution pace at 64% completion while VegamDB concludes all active development
narrative.overall_summary: SCRT2 program sustains momentum across 41 epics with 71 remaining work items, led by Query Processing teams advancing core sharding orchestration and GSI capabilities. VegamDB achieves full program closure with all 3 epics completed, transitioning one deployment epic to monitoring status. Key execution focus centers on SCRT2's April and May milestone deliveries spanning KV API integration, CDC functionality, and advanced sharding operations.

weekly_status.headline: Executive Weekly Status
weekly_status.summary:
## Weekly update for SCRT2 and VegamDB on SDB for the week of 2026-04-27

### Executive Summary
- SCRT2 on SDB making strong progress across all workstreams with multiple milestone completions
- KV API foundational components delivered and batch operations completed
- CDC before/after image support and GSI runtime maintenance on track for 4/30 milestone
- Sharding integration progressing with keyspace LSM reviews and shard orchestration development
- VegamDB pilot deployment blocked on infrastructure provisioning delays

### Overview
- Multiple SCRT2 epics completed including KV API batch operations, CDC core functionality, and GSI catalog changes
- Strong momentum on sharding capabilities with DDL and routing integration testing underway
- ZOS integration work advancing with test suite development and Docker integration planning
- VegamDB deployment remains watch status due to nodepool provisioning delays

### Highlights by Workstream

#### SCRT2 on SDB
- **Goal**: Deliver complete SCRT2 functionality on SDB including KV API, CDC, GSI, and sharding
- **Status**: On Track
- **Progress**: Completed KV API batch operations, CDC before/after image support merged to master, GSI catalog changes delivered, sharding keyspace LSM reviews progressing
- **Next**: Complete 4/30 milestone deliveries for CDC integration APIs, GSI runtime maintenance, and sharding DDL operations

#### SDB KV API
- **Goal**: Provide complete KV API functionality for SCRT2 integration
- **Status**: On Track
- **Progress**: Batch operations completed, CDC integration APIs in development, tenant operations delivered
- **Next**: Focus on sharding integration and GSI support for 5/30 milestone

#### VegamDB Pilot
- **Goal**: Deploy VegamDB on SDB infrastructure for Data Cloud integration
- **Status**: Watch
- **Progress**: KV API support completed and delivered to CDP RT team, min idle HW profile design completed
- **Next**: Resolve nodepool provisioning delays for pre-prod cell builds

### Watch Item(s)
- VegamDB pre-prod cell builds blocked on r7i.2xlarge nodepool provisioning and SDB SC overrides
- Sharding performance improvements needed for 5/30 milestone
- CDC shard movement support dependencies for 5/30 delivery
- GSI concurrent index creation testing and infrastructure requirements

risks.summary: GSI timeline based on new addition; will the timeline hold?

action_items.summary: Define acceptance tests as exit criteria for SCRT2/ZOS as part of milestone deliverable
Can we leverage the 18 node cluster in CDP created for sharding POC for perf or reduce capacity

SCRT2 milestones.narrative: Seven teams drive consistent progress with Query Processing Execution leading sharding orchestration (41% complete, 13 items) and DDL operations (79% complete) for April delivery. KV API workstream advances to 56.9% completion while CDC integration reaches 25.4% with core functionality completed by Sayonara TxP, though significant work remains across teams. Global Secondary Index development progresses at 46% with concurrent creation and engine-side ingestion APIs targeting May milestones, while Salesforce Zero Data's test suite completion represents a critical path dependency.

Need to talk about EKS->FKP gap, and what's the path to VegamDB GA

action_items.summary: Need to reset timelines for VegamDB based on alignment with Anthony

VegamDB milestones.narrative: Program achieves complete technical delivery with all development work finalized across Managed SDB, SDB Performance, and SDB LCM Foundation teams. Deployment workstream concludes successfully with pre-production cell builds maintaining Watch status for operational monitoring despite 100% completion. The transition from active development to post-deployment oversight marks successful program closure with infrastructure fully operational.
